pageContext.name: Masters of the Universe: Revelation #1 Comic Cover
pageContext.description: Dark Horse Direct is proud to present an exclusive Masters of The Universe limited edition Fine Art Print!  This variant comic cover by Stjepan Sejic for the Masters of the Universe: Revelation #1 comic written by Kevin Smith, Rob David, and Tim Sheridan (the official prequel to the hit Netflix show!) is sure to thrill even the biggest MOTU fans!  Printed as an 11 x 17 lithograph on archival paper, this limited-edition item is never to be reproduced, making it a true collector's piece.  By the Power of Grayskull, your love of Eternia will be reignited with this one-of-a-kind, collectible, lithograph print!
